tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content:
• AG Kripal Singh was an Indian cricketer from Madras (Chennai).
  • He played as an all-rounder with right-handed batting and off-spin bowling.
  • He represented India during the 1950s.
  • He made his Test debut in 1955.
  • He was known for steady lower-order contributions.
  • He played domestic cricket for Tamil Nadu.
  • He contributed in both batting and bowling roles.
  • He was part of India's early cricketing era.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content:
• Represented India in Test cricket.
  • Key domestic all-round performer.
  • Contributed in both departments of the game.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• One of the early Indian all-rounders in international cricket.
  • Played during the foundational years of Indian cricket.
